content.en:
"Father, I agree!"

Ye Xingchen took the lead in stating that Ye Tian's decision was a good thing for the human race!

Xiao Yue also nodded: "Husband, I also agree!"

Ye Xingyue naturally had no opinion and agreed with Ye Tian's decision.

Of course, he can't do this yet, Ye Tian still needs to find a suitable place, and it is not close to the other Eternal Kingdom Alliances, it is best to have a suitable treasure land nearby.

Like the Lone Star Realm Alliance, it is close to the eternal sea of fire, which has only developed.

He also wanted to find a similar place to open up the Eternal Kingdom Alliance near it.

So, in the following days, Ye Tian sent multiple replica bodies to find such a treasure in the death zone.

However, the Death Zone is almost all a Death Zone area with no resources, without any resource treasures, and occasionally a little resource treasure can be found, which is also very barren, not enough to support an Eternal Kingdom ~ Degree Alliance.

The reason why the Alliance of the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom is so weak, far inferior to the Lone Star Kingdom Alliance, is because there is no treasure land around, and the birth and breeding of resources all rely on the internal resources of the Eternal Kingdom and a few demon seed abysses.

This is naturally not good, and it is impossible to cultivate more Eternal Realm God Realms.

Of course.

Ye Tian was very patient, so he kept looking, but it couldn't be too far away, if it was too far away, it would be too troublesome for the human race to migrate to the past, and it would be very good to try to find a treasure land in a place that was not too far away.

Time passed, and Ye Tian searched the Eternal Realm for all the death zones, but he couldn't find a suitable place.

After a long time, Ye Tian felt that he should choose a random place?

However, on this day, Ye Tian finally found a good place, although it was not as good as the Eternal Fire Sea on the Lone Star Realm Alliance, it was also a very good resource treasure land.

This treasure land is located on the border of the Eternal Yin Wind Zone, and it seems that the Eternal Yin Wind Belt and a flame death zone energy collided to form a river.

The river runs through the dead zone of the area and is home to many resources.

The key is that this river is very long and large, and it is suitable for the exploration of the Eternal Dao Realm, which is naturally very dangerous for the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, but it is not much dangerous for the ordinary Eternal Dao Realm, as long as you don't go to the special place of this river, there will be no risk of falling.

And this river is mainly divided into two areas, one is the yin wind area, and the other is the fire area, one side is extremely hot, the other is extremely cold, and the sea of fog is formed at the place of convergence.

Ye Tian carefully explored this area and confirmed that there was not much danger, and after that, he prepared to open up the Eternal Realm Alliance in this area.

"This area should have only been formed for too long, so it has not been discovered, so open up an eternal kingdom here!"

Ye Tian decided.

......

Soon after, Ye Tian brought his wife and children here.

"You also open up an eternal kingdom here, one person can only open one eternal kingdom at a time, you can open three, and I can open up many at a time, or it won't be long before I can open a constant kingdom here. Ye Tian said.

"Good!"

The three of them answered.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian gave them the Eternal State Order, and Ye Tian's replica bodies also came here, and this time a total of seven replica bodies were dispatched.

The four of them opened up ten eternal kingdoms at once, and when the hundred eternal kingdoms were not opened up, he was not ready to relocate the human race.

Rumble!!!!!

Eternal realms are being opened, and ten huge light shields are attached to each other.

Gradually, the Eternal Realm was opened, but it would take 100 million years for the light mask to disperse.

During this period, without Ye Tian's permission, others naturally could not enter the interior of these eternal realms.

"Keep going!"

Ye Tian and Ye Xingchen continued to open up the Eternal Realm.

In this way, the years passed, and one eternal kingdom after another was opened.

Before you know it, a hundred eternal kingdoms have all opened up.

"A hundred eternal kingdoms!"

Ye Xingchen was extremely excited.

So many eternal kingdoms now belong to the human race!

"Next, we will relocate some Terrans, and first relocate the Terrans in the Void Domain, and the conditions will be relaxed. Then take a part of the Eternal Dao Realm from the Endless Realm and the Star Realm to help manage it. "

Ye Tian planned.

"Yes!"

......

Nation of Stars.

Ye Xingchen called Lin Lei, who originally stayed in the Endless Realm, followed Ye Xingchen to the Realm of Stars, and is now one of the highest levels of the Realm of Stars.

In addition to Lin Lei, there are also many Eternal Dao Realms, many of whom have cultivated the powerhouses of the Eternal Dao Species.

A large number of strong people gathered in a large hall, and everyone was puzzled, what kind of meeting was there this time.

Soon.

Ye Xingchen arrived and said, "Everyone, from now on, all content must be kept confidential and not allowed to be leaked, otherwise it will be regarded as a defection to the human race." "

The hearts of many Eternal Dao realms tightened, knowing that it was definitely important to know what was about to be announced.

"Wait, you follow me to a place and won't be back for a long time. Moreover, you have also sent a group of human races in the Void Realm over, and if there are other forces in the Eternal Dao Realm to follow them, they will all be killed!"

Ye Xingchen commanded.

"Yes!"

They answered.

And then.

These Eternal Dao Realms, from the Endless Realm, followed those Eternal Dao Realms of the Endless Realm, returned to the Void Realm together, and then began to relocate a large number of human beings, all of whom were weak.

But as long as you go to the Eternal Realm, your cultivation strength will inevitably be able to improve quickly.

At this point, they didn't know what was going on, but they did it.

Finally, these Eternal Dao Realms relocated and took away many humans from the Void Realm who were going to the Eternal Realm.

Subsequently.

They set out from the Endless Realm and entered the Death Zone.

These humans are all staying in the inner void of the Eternal Dao Realm, so they are not affected by the death zone, otherwise these weak humans will not be able to survive in the death zone at all.

In the days that followed, they kept shuttling and hurrying, and finally arrived at the new Eternal Kingdom Alliance.

Ye Tian named this place the Endless Realm Alliance, and the river next to it was also named the Endless Yin and Yang River by him.

"It's here!"

After Ye Xingchen descended on the Endless Realm Alliance, he said.

"This is another Eternal Kingdom Alliance?"

Lin Lei and others are eternally to the Dao realm dark path.

And these Eternal Kingdom Alliances still have light masks, indicating that they have just been opened.

"A total of a hundred eternal realms have been opened up here, and they will belong to our human race in the future!"

Ye Xingchen announced that Dao Nai.
